categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: robots.txt successfully created and configured with sitemap references.
SSL configured and viewport tags set for mobile-first indexing.

findings.title: GitLab canonical default
findings.description: Canonical link currently references Gitlab pages instead of custom domain.
findings.recommendation: Update index.html, sitemap.xml, and schema to point to custom domain.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Zero filler words detected by content_quality.py.

findings.title: Repetitive wording
findings.description: The copy relies heavily on repeating services names (Websites, Ads, Reels, Chatbots).
findings.recommendation: Refactor paragraphs to use synonyms and expand on customer benefit outcomes.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: ProfessionalService schema matches local targeting (Najafgarh, Delhi).
FAQPage schema successfully added to heads and validates.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: llms.txt file successfully configured in public root.
Explicit bot permissions granted for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and OAI-SearchBot.
High-citable FAQ blocks added to homepage.

findings.title: No brand mentions external index
findings.description: Lack of off-page citations for WebX Solution on high-authority AI sources like Wikipedia, Reddit, or YouTube.
findings.recommendation: Build brand presence via case study videos on YouTube and local listings.

phases.name: Phase 1: Content & Visual Upgrades
items: Refactor body copy to solve repetitive flags.
Add portfolio screenshots with alt descriptions.

phases.name: Phase 2: Domain Mapping
items: Update canonical links across all configs.

phases.name: Phase 3: Authority Building
items: Acquire citations and listings in Delhi NCR directories.
Post case studies on YouTube and LinkedIn.
